selection.rule: select each learned method using its method-specific validation-only rule defined below; no test-dependent selection

definitions.sp_length: untrained shortest path using physical road length
definitions.markov_sp: first-order transition-probability shortest path with validation-selected additive smoothing
definitions.neuromlr_greedy: NeuroMLR model with greedy raw-edge decoding
definitions.drncs_lg: clean-room DRNCS edge-state adaptation on the directed raw-edge line graph

selection_rules.project: maximum validation macro edge F1, then exact match, then earliest update
selection_rules.markov_sp: maximum validation macro edge F1, then exact match, then smaller smoothing alpha
selection_rules.drncs_lg: maximum validation macro edge F1, then exact match, then earliest epoch
selection_rules.drpk_static: maximum validation key-segment accuracy, then weighted BCE, then earliest epoch

confidence.justification: large fixed test sample; intervals use route-level sample variance and paired differences preserve within-route correlation

efficiency.source: same complete 248233-query formal prediction task as quality evaluation
efficiency.outer_boundary: cumulative active-attempt GNU time wall around the complete prediction task, including input/model loading, shard materialization and reloads where applicable, prediction, validation, and final assembly; downtime between attempts excluded
efficiency.interruption_accounting: sum all active attempt walls; separately report the successful final attempt and wasted interrupted active wall
efficiency.decomposition: direct and sharded internal adapter timings are supplementary; sharded sum_adapter_process_seconds and sum_adapter_prediction_seconds must not replace the uniform outer wall
efficiency.rule: the full-test single-pass outer wall, derived from receipt-bound task timing evidence, is the primary operational inference cost

execution.formal_gate: all 500-route equivalence smoke tests must pass before any full-test predictor starts
execution.resume: receipt-driven task skipping plus adapter shard/chunk recovery for neural and mixed predictors
